protein_name: May play a role during erythropoiesis through regulation of transcription factor DDIT3. Belongs to the eukaryotic ribosomal protein eS1 family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytoplasm; cytosol; cytosolic ribosome; cytosolic small ribosomal subunit; endoplasmic reticulum; nucleolus; nucleoplasm; nucleus; ribonucleoprotein complex; ribosome; small-subunit processome
raw_fields.Molecular Function: mRNA 5'-UTR binding; protein binding; RNA binding; structural constituent of ribosome
